description: When you use your basic attack, turn around and use it again.
description2: When you use your basic attack, turn around and use it again. Your basic attack inflicts Confusion 1.

name: Amped
description: Gain +1 Speed at the end of your turn.
description2: Gain +1 Speed at the end of your turn. You can move an extra time each turn.

name: Amplify
description: +1 Magic Damage.
description2: +1 Magic Damage for every 3 CHARISMA you have.

name: Animal Handler
description: You start each battle with a random vermin familiar with boosted damage and health.
description2: You start each battle with 3 random vermin familiars with boosted damage and health.

name: Bare Minimum
description: Your stats can't go below 5.
description2: Your stats can't go below 7.

name: Butcher's Soul
description: +3 Constitution, +2 Strength, -2 Speed. Butcher abilities are offered when you level up.
description2: +6 Constitution, +4 Strength, -4 Speed. Butcher abilities are offered when you level up.
unlock: Complete The Moon with the Butcher

name: Careful
description: Damage you deal to other allies is reduced to 0.
description2: Damage you deal to other allies is reduced to 0. You cannot inflict debuffs on other allies. You are careful in many other ways too.

name: Charming
description: +1 Charisma. You have a 25% chance to inflict Charm on units that damage you.
description2: +2 Charisma. You have a 40% chance to inflict Charm on units that damage you.

name: Cleric's Soul
description: +2 Constitution, +2 Charisma, -1 Dexterity, -1 Speed. Cleric abilities are offered when you level up.
description2: +4 Constitution, +4 Charisma, -2 Dexterity, -2 Speed. Cleric abilities are offered when you level up.
unlock: Complete The Moon with the Cleric

name: Daunt
description: Small enemies won't attack you.
description2: Small enemies won't attack you. Inflict Fear 1 on units that contact or attack you.

name: Dealer
description: You can use consumables on other units.
description2: You can use consumables on other units. Consumables you use have double the effect.

name: Death Boon
description: When you're downed, all allies gain All Stats Up.
description2: When you're downed, all allies gain All Stats Up 2.

name: Death's Door
description: While you're at 1 HP, your spells cost 1 mana, but can only be cast once per turn.
description2: While you're at 5 or fewer HP, your spells cost 1 mana, but can only be cast once per turn.

name: Deathproof
description: While downed, you have a 25% chance to revive with 1 HP at the end of each round.
description2: While downed, you have a 33% chance to revive with 10 HP and All Stats Up at the end of each round.

name: Dirty Claws
description: Your physical attacks on Poisoned or Bleeding enemies inflict +1 Poison and/or Bleed.
description2: Your basic attack inflicts Poison 1 and Bleed 1. Your physical attacks on Poisoned or Bleeding enemies inflict +1 Poison and/or Bleed.

name: Druid's Soul
description: +3 Charisma, +1 Luck, -2 Constitution. Druid abilities are offered when you level up.
description2: +6 Charisma, +2 Luck, -4 Constitution. Druid abilities are offered when you level up.
unlock: Complete The Moon with the Druid

name: E-Tank
description: Start each battle with +20 unfilled max health.
description2: Start each battle with +50 unfilled max health.

name: Fast Footsies
description: +1 Speed. You are immune to negative tile effects.
description2: +3 Speed. You are immune to negative tile effects. You can move through units and objects.

name: Fighter's Soul
description: +2 Strength, +1 Speed, -1 Intelligence. Fighter abilities are offered when you level up.
description2: +4 Strength, +2 Speed, -2 Intelligence. Fighter abilities are offered when you level up.
unlock: Complete The Moon with the Fighter

name: First Impression
description: Start each battle with +1 Bonus Attack.
description2: Start each battle with +2 Bonus Attacks and +2 Bonus Moves.

name: Furious
description: Gain +1 Damage each time you land a critical hit. +5% critical hit chance.
description2: Gain +1 Damage and +5% critical hit chance each time you land a critical hit. +5% critical hit chance.

name: Gassy
description: Whenever you take damage, knock back all adjacent units.
description2: Whenever you take damage, Poison all adjacent units and knock them back 10 tiles.

name: Hot-Blooded
description: Burn you inflict is increased by 1.
description2: Burn you inflict is increased by 2.

name: Hunter's Soul
description: +3 Dexterity, +2 Luck, -1 Constitution, -2 Speed. Hunter abilities are offered when you level up.
description2: +6 Dexterity, +4 Luck, -2 Constitution, -4 Speed. Hunter abilities are offered when you level up.
unlock: Complete The Moon with the Hunter

name: Infested
description: 50% chance to spawn a flea familiar when you end your turn.
description2: Spawn 2-3 fleas at the start of each battle. 50% chance to spawn a flea familiar when you end your turn.

name: Jester's Soul
description: Abilities from any class are offered when you level up. You can reroll your level up options twice.
description2: +2 Strength, +2 Dexterity, +2 Constitution, +2 Intelligence, +2 Charisma, +2 Speed, +2 Luck. Abilities from any class are offered when you level up. You can reroll your level up options twice.
unlock: Complete The Moon with the Jester

name: Late Bloomer
description: On your 5th turn, you gain All Stats Up 3.
description2: On your 3rd turn, you gain All Stats Up 3.

name: Leader
description: Adjacent allies have +1 Damage and +1 Range.
description2: All allies have +1 Damage and +1 Range.

name: Longshot
description: +1 Range.
description2: +2 Range. Your ranged attacks have +25% critical hit chance.

name: Luck Drain
description: Gain +1 Luck whenever a unit is downed.
description2: Gain +1 Luck whenever a unit is downed. Gain an extra +2 Luck whenever YOU down a unit.

name: Lucky
description: +4 Luck.
description2: +7 Luck.

name: Mage's Soul
description: +2 Intelligence, +2 Charisma, -1 Constitution, -1 Strength. Mage abilities are offered when you level up.
description2: +4 Intelligence, +4 Charisma, -2 Constitution, -2 Strength. Mage abilities are offered when you level up.
unlock: Complete The Moon with the Mage

name: Mange
description: Inflict Poison 1 on units that contact you.
description2: Inflict 1 Poison, Bleed, Bruise, Weakness, and Leech on units that contact you.

name: Mania
description: 10% chance to restore all your mana at the start of your turn.
description2: 25% chance to restore all your mana at the start of your turn.

name: Metal Detector
description: 5% chance to spawn a coin when you move over a tile.
description2: 10% chance to spawn a coin when you move over a tile.

name: Might of the Meek
description: Damage you deal that's 2 or less is always critical.
description2: Damage you deal that's 3 or less is always critical. +50% Crit Damage.

name: Mini-Me
description: Gain a half-sized copy of yourself that has 50% of your stats. The copy is AI controlled.
description2: Gain a half-sized copy of yourself that has 50% of your stats and quarter-sized copy that has 25% of your stats. The copies are AI controlled.

name: Monk's Soul
description: +2 Intelligence, +2 Charisma, -1 Strength, -1 Dexterity. Monk abilities are offered when you level up.
description2: +4 Intelligence, +4 Charisma, -2 Strength, -2 Dexterity. Monk abilities are offered when you level up.
unlock: Complete The Moon with the Monk

name: Natural Healing
description: You have +1 Health Regeneration.
description2: You have +2 Health Regeneration. Adjacent allies gain +1 Health Regeneration.

name: Necromancer's Soul
description: +2 Constitution, +1 Charisma, -2 Strength. Necromancer abilities are offered when you level up.
description2: +4 Constitution, +2 Charisma, -4 Strength. Necromancer abilities are offered when you level up.
unlock: Complete The Moon with the Necromancer

name: Overconfident
description: While at full HP, reduce the cost of your spells by 2, but take double damage. This can't reduce mana costs to less than 1.
description2: While at full HP, reduce the cost of your spells by 2, but take double damage. This can't reduce mana costs to less than 1. When you cast a spell, heal 1 HP.

name: Patience
description: If you end your turn without taking any actions, gain an extra turn at the end of the round. You don't regenerate mana on your main turn if you pass it.
description2: If you end your turn without taking any actions, gain an extra turn at the end of the round.

name: Protection
description: +1 Holy Shield.
description2: +3 Holy Shield.

name: Psychic's Soul
description: +2 Intelligence, +2 Charisma, -1 Speed, -1 Constitution. Psychic abilities are offered when you level up.
description2: +4 Intelligence, +4 Charisma, -2 Speed, -2 Constitution. Psychic abilities are offered when you level up.
unlock: Complete The Moon with the Psychic

name: Pulp
description: When you kill a unit or destroy a corpse, it becomes meat.
description2: +4 Damage. When you kill a unit or destroy a corpse, it becomes meat.

name: Rockin'
description: Spawn 4 small rocks at the start of each battle.
description2: Spawn 4 small rocks and 4 boulders at the start of each battle.

name: Santa Sangre
description: When you're downed, allies heal 12 HP. Excess healing is converted to Shield.
description2: When you're downed, allies heal 20 HP. Excess healing is converted to Shield.

name: Scavenger
description: If your trinket slot is empty, equip a small consumable food item at the start of each battle.
description2: If your trinket slot is empty, equip a big consumable food item at the start of each battle.

name: Self-Assured
description: Gain a random stat up whenever you down a unit.
description2: Gain All Stats Up whenever you down a unit.

name: Serial Killer
description: After you kill 3 units, gain +6 Speed and backstabs have 100% crit chance.
description2: After you kill 3 units, gain +6 Speed, backstabs have 100% crit chance, and gain an extra basic attack each turn.

name: Skill Share
description: Your other passive ability is shared with the other cats in your party at the start of each battle.
description2: Your other passive ability is shared with the other cats in your party at the start of each battle. When breeding, your children will always inherit your other passive.
unlock: Complete The Boneyard with a Collarless cat

name: Slugger
description: +1 Damage.
description2: +3 Damage.

name: Strength in Numbers
description: Your familiars have +1 Damage for each other familiar you have.
description2: You and your familiars have +1 Damage for each other familiar you have.

name: Study
description: Gain +1 Intelligence whenever you hit a new type of unit with an attack or ability.
description2: Gain +1 Intelligence whenever you hit a new type of unit with an attack or ability. All enemies of that type become Marked.

name: Tank's Soul
description: +4 Constitution, -1 Dexterity, -1 Intelligence. Tank abilities are offered when you level up.
description2: +8 Constitution, -2 Dexterity, -2 Intelligence. Tank abilities are offered when you level up.
unlock: Complete The Moon with the Tank

name: Thief's Soul
description: +4 Speed, +1 Luck, +1 Strength, +1 Constitution. Thief abilities are offered when you level up.
description2: +8 Speed, +2 Luck, +2 Strength, +2 Constitution. Thief abilities are offered when you level up.
unlock: Complete The Moon with the Thief

name: Tinkerer's Soul
description: +4 Intelligence, -1 Charisma, -1 Luck. Tinkerer abilities are offered when you level up.
description2: +8 Intelligence, -2 Charisma, -2 Luck. Tinkerer abilities are offered when you level up.
unlock: Complete The Moon with the Tinkerer

name: Unrestricted
description: Actions with a once per battle restriction can be cast once per turn instead.
description2: Actions with a once per battle restriction can be cast once per turn instead. Actions with a once per turn restriction have a 50% chance to be castable again.

name: Unscarred
description: While at full hp you have 100% critical hit chance.
description2: While at full hp you have 100% critical hit chance, +5 Mana Regeneration and +1 All Stats Up.

name: Void Soul
description: Only upgraded Collarless abilities are offered when you level up.
description2: Only upgraded Collarless abilities are offered when you level up. Collarless spells cost 1 less mana.
unlock: Complete The Moon with a Collarless cat

name: Whipcracker
description: When you damage an ally they gain +1 Damage.
description2: When you damage an ally they gain +1 Damage and +1 Speed.

name: Wiggly
description: +25% Dodge Chance.
description2: +25% Dodge Chance and +25% critical hit chance.

name: Worms
description: 50% chance to spawn a maggot familiar when you end your turn.
description2: 50% chance to spawn a mutated maggot familiar when you end your turn.

name: Zenkai Boost
description: If you end battle with 1 HP, gain +1 to a random stat permanently and start the next battle at full HP with +3 All Stats Up.
description2: If you end battle with 1 HP, gain +1 to 3 random stats permanently and start the next battle at full HP with +3 All Stats Up.
